cases.name: CREATE
cases.comment: Benchmarks contract deployment via the CREATE opcode. A factory contract repeatedly deploys minimal Child contracts using `new Child(nonce)`. Each iteration produces a unique contract address derived from the factory address and its internal nonce.

inputs.comment: Benchmark: repeatedly deploy Child contracts via CREATE

cases.name: CREATE2
cases.comment: Benchmarks contract deployment via the CREATE2 opcode. A factory contract repeatedly deploys minimal Child contracts using `new Child{salt: nonce}(nonce)`. Each iteration produces a unique contract address derived from the factory address, the salt, and the init code hash.

inputs.comment: Benchmark: repeatedly deploy Child contracts via CREATE2
